title: Report on the Post Office (Future Technology Portfolio 2025 to 2026) Subsidy
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DBT concerning the proposed Post Office (Future Technology Portfolio 2025 to 2026) Subsidy.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of DBT’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the Post Office (Future Technology Portfolio 2025 to 2026) Subsidy by DBT case page. "
